programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: The ALDC heads to Australia to perform at the ASTRA Awards; Abby loses her passport and leaves the team stranded in Sydney without her; Jess confronts the other mothers; Maddie misses a crucial rehearsal when she goes to an interview in Abby's place.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Not My Family
programme.desc: Stephanie forsøker å reparere forholdet til boren, Spencer. Mischa treffer Perez Hilton, som mobbet henne da hun var skuespiller. Gnisten mellom Audrina og Justin fortsetter å ulme, men Justin kan ha fått øye for noen annen også.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: A Legend in His Own Mind
programme.desc: Audrina får sjokkerende informasjon om Justin Bobby, og tvinges til å etterprøve motivene hans. Sinnene koker når Spencer og Heidi stiller spørsmålstegn ved sitt forhold til Brody. Brandon Thomas Lee arrangere en bassengfest hos sin mor.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Not to Eavesdrop, But to Eavesdrop
programme.desc: Audrina konfronterer Justin med at han nektet å ha kysset henne. Brody klager over forholdet til faren, til Caitlyn, og sin forhenværende bestevenn, Spencer. Spencer og Heidis forhold settes på prøve når de kjemper med å få firmaet til å vokse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Vegas for å se Brodys DJ-forestilling. Justin finner seg plutselig midt i en konfrontasjon mellom Audrina og Stephanie. Storbrann herjer gjennom Malibu, og Kaitlynn frykter for Brodys liv når han blir værende i evakueringssonen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: I Don't Think We Can Be Friends
programme.desc: Brody og Kaitlynn håndterer det ødeleggende etterspillet av Malibu-brannene. Audrina fatter et vanskelig valg om Justin. Samtidig har Mischa en prøvespilling med høy innsats for en filmrolle. Heidi begynner å gjenopplive popstjerne karrieren.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: The Fight For Georgia
programme.desc: Forholdet til Chloe og Sam er som en berg-og-dal-bane. Max går lei av Stevie og finner noe morsommere et annet sted. Ankomsten til en ny eks får Georgia og Brad til å spore av.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Marty The Meddler
programme.desc: Klørne kommer frem når gruppen drar på en vill safari og Deans alfahann-status blir truet. Marty blander seg i Chloe og Sams forhold, og John har hendene fulle med Georgia.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Love Is In The Air
programme.desc: Terror-nettbrettet har en funksjonsfeil og sender Marty på en date med Sam. En nykommer sender tvillingene ut i kamp, mens John og Georgias forhold bare styrker seg.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: #Ballininbalifinale
programme.desc: Bali-strandfesten får en dramatisk slutt når den siste nyankommeren skaper kaos i villaen. Georgia og John klarer ikke det siste hinderet, og Chloe får endelig det hun vil ha av Sam.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Bobby's Dilemma
programme.desc: Den nye kjærlighetsjakten starter på Mexicos strender. Daisy limer seg på Aaron og Essex-gutten Bobby legger an på Rhianne, men vil den første eksen stikke kjepper i hjulene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Datingen fortsetter når Bobby og Bayley drar på 'hjerte til hjerte'-date. Aarons hode blir fordreid, men vil han gå fra Daisy? Tre nyankomne får villaen til å ryste i grunnvollene og noen må dra hjem.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Vanessa's Ford Festiva L.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Jonathan's Honda CRX.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps David's Ford Econoline.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Will's Jeep Grand Wagoneer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Esmerelda's Pontiac Sunbird.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Terese's Ford LTD Crown Victoria Station Wagon.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Amber's Chevy Cavalier.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Louis' Subaru Impreza.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: In this episode, the crew pimps Andrew's Cadillac Fleetwood Hearse.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1978 Cadillac Sedan DeVille
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen Niles Cadillac Sedan DeVille. Nile ruller hjem i en mørkerosa metallic bil med bagasjerommet fullt av nye sko.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Turn The Paige
programme.desc: Alle prøver å finne ut hvilket som er det neste perfekte par. Kayla blir avslørt når hun spiller ut Ryan mot Wes, og Simone prøver å splitte Chris T og Shanley for godt. Et besøk i sannhetsboksen snur opp-ned på huset.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It's So Hard...To Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Huset er rystet etter at Paige og Chris T er bekreftet som det perfekte par og sendt til Bryllupssuiten. Shanley er totalt knust etter å ha blitt skilt fra Chris T, og Kayla friker ut når Ryan går for å trøste Jessica.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Getting Dumped On
programme.desc: Kayla og Ryan krangler, men huset vender seg mot Kayla da hun kommer med følsomme opplysninger som truer Ambers forhold til Ethan. En slibrig utfordring setter noen av parenes evne til å holde sammen på prøve.

programme.title: Are You The One?: White Party
programme.desc: På Den hvite festen har alle i huset det gøy, men John må forholde seg til Jacys følelser for Scali. I en utfordring på stranden får parrene sand under neglene.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Rub Down With A Happy Ending
programme.desc: Huset prøver å finne ut hvordan de skal finne deres perfekte match og vinne en million dollar. Jacy konfronterer sine følelser for Scali og John når huset forsøker å løse den siste kjærlighetstrekanten.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion Special
programme.desc: Alle de tjue deltakere blir gjenforent med Ryan Devlin for å diskutere hva som skjedde på Hawaii, og vi får se tidligere ikke vist materiale, sjokkerende avsløringer og sladder om parene som fortsatt er sammen.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Following emotional reunions with their proud parents, Chef Ramsay tasks the final two chefs with creating five meals in only 60 minutes, with the winner earning first pick for their brigade in the final challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The two remaining chefs go head to head for the final time, before the new executive chef at Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen at Caesar's Palace is announced.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Chef Ramsay has relocated `Hell's Kitchen' to Las Vegas, to find out who will be the next head chef at the brand new Hell's Kitchen restaurant in beautiful Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a shrimp challenge in which one hopeful makes a grave error, before a tough opening service for both teams. With Lisa Vanderpump and Wayne Brady in the VIP booths, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The day begins with a Caesar salad challenge. As service begins, Olympic gold medallist Apolo Ohno and NFL star Marshall Faulk take the VIP seats.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Trouble brews in the Red team, with Amber questioning their choice of head chef. The challenge sees the teams tackling a reception for newlyweds, before a difficult service.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Sprengt i filler
programme.desc: En fange på rømmen vil drepe alle som var ansvarlige for å sende ham i fengsel. Han angriper dem én etter en og sparer Walker til slutt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Dyp spaning
programme.desc: Med hestehale, en italiensk silkeskjorte og en lekker sportsbil samarbeider Walker med en vakker spaner i Miami for å ta en narkobaron.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Beskytterne
programme.desc: To arbeidere dør på en oljerigg i Texas i merkelige ulykker. Walker spaner for å finne ut hvem som saboterer riggene og hvorfor.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Kollisjonskurs
programme.desc: Walker og C.D. haster for å redde C.D.s niese når hun kidnappes av ekskjæresten som tvinger henne med på bankran som en slags nåtidens Bonnie og Clyde.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Poeng etter
programme.desc: Etter noen tvilsomme avgjørelser på kamp blir treneren for fotballaget ved en skole i en småby i Texas drept, men Walker og Trivette tror ikke han ble drept av sinte fans.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Nattens ondskap
programme.desc: I sinne overfor den hvite mann for å ha forstyrret en urgammel indianergravplass står en ond medisinmann opp fra de døde for å terrorisere de ansvarlige.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Før hun oppdaget at hun var gravid, var Maci en toppelev fra Chattanooga i Tennessee. Forloveden Ryan viser ingen interesse for å hjelpe henne, og Maci må finne ut om forholdet vil overleve eller om hun må takle utfordringene alene.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Farrah er en populær cheerleader fra Iowa, men da vennene begynner å sladre om at hun skal bli alenemor, gir hun opp skolen og begynner å bruke altfor mye tid med sin dominerende mor.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Partyjenta Amber hadde aldri forestilt seg at hun skulle flytte sammen med sin velmenende, umodne kjæreste Gary så tidlig. Men nå venter de barn, og må takle et voksent ansvar på et tenåringsbudsjett.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Code
programme.desc: Leonard Nimoy becomes a member of the Impossible Missions Force and, as Paris of the IMF, helps crack a vital code by hijacking a plane so the enemy can capture one of the passengers

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Mastermind
programme.desc: In a battle with organized crime, the IMF sets up a bizarre mind-transfer experiment to convince a syndicate leader he is being double-crossed on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Numbers Game
programme.desc: Guest star Mai (cq) Britt is a dangerous obstacle when the IMF sets out to learn the number of her husband's Swiss hank account by convincing him World War III has started on Paramount Television Is "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Commandante
programme.desc: To free an imprisoned priest whose life is at stake, Jim Phelps poses as a missionary, Paris becomes a Chinese general and Barney builds a helicopter on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Robot
programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing, with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: New Workers
programme.desc: Oi Oi! Geordiene er tilbake! Sjefen Anna sjokkerer gjengen ved å sende inn noen nye deltagere. Gutta blir glade, men ikke Sophie og Chloe, og det går skeis på den første utekvelden.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Decisions
programme.desc: Annas plan for å finne de beste nykommerne fortsetter. Aaron og Marty bestemmer seg for å bli bedre kjent med Sarah og Abbie. Etter krangelen med Zahida får Chloe store nyheter, og familjen blir sjokkert når to nye deltagere kommer.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Testing The Newbies
programme.desc: Nathan vil teste hvor ville de nye arbeiderne er. Chloe vender tilbake, Marnie og Marty barker sammen over Aaron og alle får et kjempesjokk når de ser den seneste nykommeren. Marty prøver å snakke med Chloe, som vender ham ryggen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Sam's Smashed
programme.desc: Martys plan om å sjarmere Elettra med en ny hårfarge går skeis, og Marnie er redd for at hun gir Aaron blandede signaler. Chloe kaster seg over en nykommer - kan han hjelpe henne med å glemme Marty?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Newbies Throw A Party
programme.desc: Marnie er kjempespent når en ny deltager kommer, men Aaron vil at hun skal ta en tøff beslutning. Marty gir ikke opp om Elettra, men Chloe har andre planer. Gaz gir nykommerne den ultimate testen: En hjemmefest.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Invictus
programme.desc: With Vincent caged, Gabriel allows him to see his infant son who suddenly begins to make a miraculous recovery.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: In the Forests of the Night
programme.desc: Rolley is shot while trying to rob a liquor store and takes refuge in the tunnels.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Reckoning"
programme.desc: A woman whom Father knows returns to the city. She asks him to join her and he considers it. At the same time Diana is working on a murder. And it turns that the victim is someone Father knows.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Legacies
programme.desc: Upon returning to "The World Below" upon the knowledge of some of ex-tunnel inhabitants being murdered, Father encounters Gregory Coyle who seeks revenge for the death of his father by cave-in 20 years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found
programme.desc: A boy befriends a couple that recently lost its young son. A trainee schemes to steal Julie's job. A bickering married couple takes the cruise and stays in separate cabins...next door to each other.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: MacGyver: Passages
programme.desc: MacGyver has a ghostly encounter while fighting for his life in a hospital bed.

programme.title: MacGyver: Rush To Judgement
programme.desc: While on jury duty for a murder trial, MacGyver takes matters into his own hands and uncovers some startling evidence in support of the defendant.

programme.title: MacGyver: Humanity
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton find themselves under attack when they travel to Romania to investigate the archives of deposed dictator Ceausescu.

programme.title: MacGyver: Tough Boys
programme.desc: MacGyver goes head-to-head with a new Challenge Center instructor when he suspects him of directing a vigilante gang.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Gun
programme.desc: MacGyver must aid a member of the Challenge Center who has been implicated in the shooting death of a police officer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock: The Psychic
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thoroughbred
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A romance in bloom is nipped in the bud when Steve's new girlfriend is charged with murder. An instructor of modern dance, Cindy is shocked to learn she's being charged with killing one of the owners of the studio where she works.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A cruel collage prank comes back to haunt four young women in later life. Although Amanda had almost forgotten it, a recent letter brings back the unpleasant memory.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Surprise, surprise! While investigating the murder of a call-girl, Dr. Sloan is caught in the middle of a vice raid!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan becomes involved in more than politics when he accepts an invitation to attend an election campaign party. A face in a crowd of well-wishers awakens old memories for Mayor Ridgeway's wife, Lauren, with murderous results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Where's the Beach?
programme.desc: Guidoene drar til stranda for en siste, episk ferie før sommeren tar slutt. Angelina har lyst på Vinny, og Snooki er klar for å feste som om det var 2009.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Staten Island Smackdown
programme.desc: Snooki mister kontrollen, Mike inspirerer, og Angelina og Vinnys omstridte forhold blir så ille at det aldri kan fikses.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jewish Barbie
programme.desc: Angelina og Vinny prøver å sameksistere, Deena er kanskje ikke den eneste som er kjøttbollegravid, og det blir déjà vu når Ronnie hopper i boblebadet med Angelinas venn.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Pork Roll eller Taylor Ham?
programme.desc: Gjengen savner den klumsete Deena, så de bestemmer seg for å kidnappe henne. Og hva skjer når Ronnie inviterer 'Jewish Barbie' til å overnatte på rommet hans?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Wallopin' in Manalapan
programme.desc: Det er tid for hevn når romkameratene er ute etter idioten som plager dem i baren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie Magro's Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen kjemper Deena og romkameratene mot kreft. Spiralgjengen diskuterer meningen med livet. Og en mystisk telefonsamtale fra Jen gjør Ronnies liv enda mer dramatisk.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is one of the few Mexican food specialists in Tokyo. This is a Latin duel at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Andre Pachon is the leader of the French chef community in Japan. Several of his apprentices have already appeared, but this time Pachon sends his number one man.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The younger sibling of the Liang brothers, rulers of Cantonese cuisine in Japan, faces the Iron Chef Chinese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen engages Challenger Lian Su Qin using konnyaku, a unique Japanese healthy food.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is a woman who knows what she likes. As an elite culinary critic, she trained at Le Cordon Bleu and as well as Taillevent, an elite French restaurant in Paris.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The former Iron Chef Michiba decides that Morimoto needs some help finding his feet, so he recruits his number one sous-chef from his own days at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood verdens verste smerter i 'Halebeinbrutalitet', opplever at allergisesongen er ille i 'Naturlig snørrete' og drar langt ut på landet og fester i 'Partylåver'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Madison Pettis II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Madison Pettis mellom snøbrettkjørere og skiløpere i 'Snøkrig', slåss mot sulten på verste måte i 'Nattmatkatastrofe' og sykler på feil trær i 'Sykkel møter bark'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lexi Rivera seg inn i spillet med noen 'Nattatleter', tar en slumsete drink laget av noen 'Sleivete miksologer' og feirer irriterende forhold i 'Elsker å hate dem'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lexi Rivera II
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' benytter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lexi Rivera de bevegelige trappene i 'Opptrappet smerte', møter morderiske barn som muligens er 'Foreldrekverkere' og kan ikke krysse gaten uten å oppleve 'Overgangskræsj'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' fyrer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av noen 'Skliskudd', starter hårete branner 'I fyr og flamme' og krangler om rot i 'Snuskete kjærlighet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood tak i en partner og nyter 'Parskøyting', gjør seg klar til en underholdende kveld i 'Brettspillmiserer' og opplever hvor tøft det er å dele rom med 'Pottesure papegøyer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvilken terrengbåt de helst velger i 'Landjakk', ser på alle måtene barn kan sette seg fast i 'Smårollingfeller' og avslutter med distre folk som er 'Uten romforståelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood i gang kjøretøyene sine i 'Flyktende motorer', vender det andre kinnet til i 'Overraskelseskyss' og hogger i vei med litt 'Økseanarki'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood L
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og deres spesielle gjest Lolo Wood, redd for å få sprøyter i 'Stikkpanikk', får igjen verbalt i 'Ta igjen-attakk' og føler hele dekkmønsteret når de blir 'Overkjørt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Risk-All Point
programme.desc: Et kraftigere Andromeda-skip eksploderer på grunn av sannsynlig sabotasje, og tvinger Dylans mannskap til å redde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den rette hesten
programme.desc: Beka setter både mannskapet og en hel planet i fare når en tidligere kjærlighet dukker opp.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hva skjer med en revidert utsatt?
programme.desc: Andromeda mottar et rop om hjelp fra pastor Bam.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a popular young man, investigators faced the daunting task of searching for one boat among 1200 others.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, 82-year-old Kathryn Bishop was found dead in her Pennsylvania home. Tiny clues on the victim's body would tell police what happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When the number and volume of bloodstains at the scene was greater than usual, it was up to forensic scientists to find out why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Lone Lopez, Ghost Lights, Marie Hilley, Missing Newbown and Sunshine Guys.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Survivor, Poison Shake, Elks Club Murder, Psychic Family Roots, Update: Charlie's Angels and Grady's Bible.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Who Killed Kaitlyn?, Reincarnation Pts. 1 & 2, Texas A&M Rapist, Update: Friends to the End and Update: Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Teen Tragedy, Real Twin Peaks, Missing Page, Update: Robbinghood, Gigi's Amnesia and Prison Mom.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Boston Strangler II, Vancouver Lights, Jai Alai, Dub's Last Chance, Mystery Man and Update: Musician Sings the Blues.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dial A For Abduction, Alamo Treasure, Deadly RX, Harold and Ma, Update: Mrs. Millionaire and Dates.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Remnant of Blame
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Shreds of Evidence
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Drawing Conclusions
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written in Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Mill Street Barracks
programme.desc: Built in 1861 Mill Street Barracks is steeped in rich history. It has accommodated many branches of the armed forces throughout its life. Like many other barracks it has also been used as a morgue making it a prime location for the supernatural.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Stranger in the Blitz
programme.desc: Damaged during the blitz, the location the team investigate was a former war hospital for the injured and wounded, based in Liverpool, UK.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Real Teens: Real Topics
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Rescues a Runaway
programme.desc: Sherry was attacked at 15 and ran away from home. She wants Steve’s help with reuniting her with her mother. Then, Dawn's teenage daughter Cathy recently gave birth, but lives in fear of the baby’s unemployed and unstable father Nick.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: A soldier is stabbed to death at a drive-thru. Kenda’s only clue is that this is somehow tied to a breakdancing competition.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda’s city into a panic. A cryptic letter to the District Attorney’s office suggests the girl isn’t the only victim.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A army vet is found bleeding to death on the asphalt of a parking lot -- his chest littered with too many knife wounds to count. Kenda’s case is stuck in first gear until a gruesome clue appears.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Master Key
programme.desc: When a pregnant mother and her two young sons are brutally slain, pressure mounts for the CSPD to catch the cold-blooded monster who did it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: #1 Suspect

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A retired military officer is found dead in his own backyard during a freak ice storm in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 304

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 706

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 405

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: I juli 2022 rystes Mölndal da en død mann blir funnet halvt avkledd, brennemerket og med en båndopptaker plassert på kroppen. Politiet mistenker at noe langt mer urovekkende enn et vanlig drap har funnet sted.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 201

programme.title: Secret War: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists
programme.desc: Fitzroy Maclean, an MP and WWII spy, supported Tito's Communist partisans in Yugoslavia against the Germans, forging a lasting friendship and honored at Tito's funeral post-war.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Chucks lillebror
programme.desc: Et sinna barn ønsker inderlig å hevne seg, men målskiven Spencer prøver iherdig å stoppe ham. Gibby blir knust når hans nye lekelaserpistol går i stykker, men blir fra seg av henrykkelse når Freddies reparsjion gir den overraskende krefter.

programme.title: iCarly: Utestengt
programme.desc: Når Carly bannlyser T-Bo fra hennes og Spencers hjem, hevner han seg ved å ikke slippe Carly inn på Groovy Smoothie. Imens oppdager Freddie og Gibby at det fins mange fordeler ved å spille i band...og også et par ulemper.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Soul Mates
programme.desc: When Sabrina wakes up with cold feet on her wedding day, she hopes a little magic and words of wisdom from her mother and aunt will help.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Pilot
programme.desc: Sabrina’s Sweet 16 becomes a truly magical birthday when she discovers she’s a witch.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bundt Friday
programme.desc: Under the influence of truth sprinkles, Sabrina learns honesty is the best policy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Terrible Things
programme.desc: Sabrina's good intentions turn bad when she uses her magic to meddle in other people's lives.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The True Adventures of Rudy Kazootie
programme.desc: Big trouble comes in a small package when Sabrina takes a babysitting job.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Geek like me
programme.desc: Popular Libby manages to turn being a geek into a position of power.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Halloween Story
programme.desc: Sabrina faces a frightful dilemma when she must be in two places at once for Halloween.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dream Date
programme.desc: Something’s cooking when Aunts Hilda and Zelda use man dough to bake a date for Sabrina.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Third Aunt from the Sun
programme.desc: As fun Aunt Vesta, Raquel Welch shows Sabrina how the Other Realm half live.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Magic Joel
programme.desc: Sabrina’s job as a magician’s assistant is short-lived when she accidentally makes the boss disappear.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Oops
programme.desc: Mallory resents Elyse for the advice she gives her pregnant friend.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Have Gun, Will Unravel
programme.desc: The Keatons consider buying a gun for protection after getting burglarized.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Summer Of '82
programme.desc: Seduced by an "older woman" of twenty-one, the hitherto inexperienced Alex is devastated to learn that she thinks of their relationship as casual.

programme.title: Fem i familien: I Never Killed for My Father
programme.desc: A visit from Steven's father evokes confrontation between the two.

programme.title: Fem i familien: No Nukes Is Good Nukes
programme.desc: To the dismay of the Keaton children and their equally conservative grandparents, Steven and Elyse take time out Thanksgiving Day to attend an anti-nuke rally-and end up spending the holiday in jail.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Suzanne Takes You Down
programme.desc: Soon after freelance architect Elyse Keaton hires her friend Suzanne Davis to handle clerical chores, she wants to fire the under-qualified, overly aggressive secretary.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Death Of A Grocer
programme.desc: Though Alex loves working at Mr. Adler's "Mom and Pop" grocery store, to the old man's dismay, he quits to "climb the corporate ladder" at an ultramodern supermarket.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Give Your Uncle A Kiss
programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Big Brother Is Watching
programme.desc: As the new editor of his school paper, Alex uncovers a cheating scandal and to everyone's chagrin, prints a list of students who were caught including Mallory.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Job Interview
programme.desc: Dommer Jessie har et nytt program, en mann venter på et jobbintervju, to damer sludrer, parkeringsvakter diskuterer Val Kilmer, en pensjonert mann fra hæren hører om et nytt prosjekt og en kvinne introduserer sin forlovede for foreldrene.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Gang Stand-Off
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer gangstere som er gale etter 'Twilight,' besøk i en verden der navn er promper, og rasistiske superhelter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan & Andre Break Up
programme.desc: To venner kommer i klammeri på en klubb, Meegan og André har en seriøs samtale, en rapper går fra et intervju, Conrad flyr business class og Keegan har en ny bart.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Country Music
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Steve Jobs' efterfølger, Ice-T, som en uoppdragen valp og Rihanna og Chris Brown prøver igjen.

programme.title: Key & Peele: The Branding
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan utforsker opplevelsen som sort collegestudent og snylterne som suksess medfører. Andre sketsjer inkluderer et nabolags reaksjon på et mystisk vesen, når man kan - og ikke kan - si et kontroversielt ord.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Alien Imposters
programme.desc: Romvesener invaderer jorden, en familie forliker seg med en slektnings homobryllup og noen rasister gir uttrykk for noen overraskende meninger.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Boarding Group One
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan ikke får lov å gå om bord i flyet sitt, en bølle som nekter å helle ut innholdet i spritflaska og en bokser som sviner til modstanderen sin.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sexy Vampires
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en uhyggelig asiatisk spøkelsessamboer, kara ser på den lyse siden av tortur og Keegan opplever et hus fullt av sexy vampyrer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Airplane Showdown
programme.desc: En flyvert må håndtere en passasjer som ikke vil ha på sikkerhetsbeltet, britiske oppdagelsesreisende diskuterer sine reiser, to par forsøker å unngå spoilere på en dobbeltdate og en bibelgruppe opplever en guddommelig intervensjon.

programme.title: Key & Peele: MC Mom
programme.desc: En gangster deltar i et skuddrama, en mor skriver en sang til sønnen sin, to bondefangere konkurrerer, Big Boi møter André 3000 og to karer kommer ut for en bilulykke.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Scariest Movie Ever
programme.desc: En vampyr avslører seg selv, en seriemorder blir forhindret og et barn får ønsket sitt oppfylt.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel and Craig Get Married

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby

programme.desc: Crack addict Tyrone Biggums visits an elementary school.

programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Male Cheerleader
programme.desc: Daniel lar oss få se på når han sover og lar oss spørre ham om alt. Dessuten får en frekk cheerleader gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Bryan Adams Kid
programme.desc: Daniel viser fram sin Halloween-drakt og hjelper til med å fange et internettmonster. Dessuten får en kjærlighedssyk teenager gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Pikespeider-tyver
programme.desc: Daniel taler solskinnsstatens heteste kriminelles sak, får staben til å spise eksklusiv dyremat og starter en ny sportsliga.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Taxi Dave
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Thanksgiving med sine fans og den rappende taxisjåføren får gjenoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Virgin Trampoline Jumper
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en jomfru med å sjekke og introduserer dere for de aller sinteste damene i USA.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Season Four Web Reflection
programme.desc: Med sylskarp humor og bitende kommentarer, fører komikeren Daniel Tosh oss inn i alle aspekter av Internett, fra det helt absurde til det geniale, i denne ukentlige serien med forkjellige tema.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Gingers Have Souls
programme.desc: I sesongpremieren utfører Daniel og hans personale sportsutfordringer, han sender et våget bilde til en fremmed og Michael - en fyr som blir mobbet for å være rødhåret - får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: X12 (CeWEBrity Profile)
programme.desc: Daniel feirer Valentinsdag med å la deg beklage deg over partneren din, og verdens eneste svarte superhelt får nettoppreisning.

programme.title: Tosh.0: The Oscars Spoiler Alerts
programme.desc: Daniel får workouttips til soverommet og avslører alt om filmene som er nominert til Oscar for Beste film.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tosh.0 February 26, 2013 - Courtroom C**k Guy
programme.desc: The Courtroom C**k Guy gets a Web Redemption, Daniel tests out different slurs, and comedian Greg Hahn asks for medical advice.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ventriloquist Fail
programme.desc: Daniel nekter å lage en 'Harlem Shake'-video, og Candice, buktaleren som forlot scenen, får gjenoppreisning på nettet.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After deciding they can't wait to get married, Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) plan their nuptials for the following week.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline and Richard (Malcolm Gets) prepare to leave for Italy to visit his newborn son, Richard makes a confession that gives Caroline second thoughts about their future together.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline Duffy (Lea Thompson) has her professional life just theway she wants it. "Caroline in the City," the comic strip she created, turned intomerchandising gold with an array of greeting cards, books and calendars.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Del are moments away from departing for a weekend trip to Atlantic City when Richard bursts into the apartment with news that he has been mugged.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Annie scheme to get Richard's paintings displayed in a prestigious gallery, and he's thrilled when their efforts earn him the recognition of gallery owner Kenneth Arabian.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Del(Eric Lutes) get carried away competing on the racquetball court, Caroline injures her back and ends up confined to bed.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline gets stiffed at her ATM, she meets with bank personnel to retrieve her money. However, because the surveillance camera captured her in an awkward moment, she's too embarrassed to let the bank manager view the tape of her transaction.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline and Del agree to go to dinner with Annie and Warren, her new boyfriend, they find that Annie left out one minor detail about his background --Warren's an ex-convict with a burglary record.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline finds out the Christmas gift Del gave her might have been extremely expensive, she ponders the message he may be trying to send her about their relationship.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard sets Caroline up on a date with an art council member who happens to hold the key to Richard's future as a successful artist, but when he finds out the man is married Richard wrestles with protecting a friend or furthering his career.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker

programme.title: Becker
