programme.desc: The ALDC's biggest west coast rival returns to compete; Abby tests Mackenzie's confidence with a big opportunity; Jess is desperate for JoJo to have a featured role when her grandmother visits.

programme.desc: The team pursues a fugitive over volcanic mountains and into the wilds of Puna, Hawaii.

programme.desc: A hefty fugitive has a long record of violence and two siblings that may rat him out.

programme.desc: Leland and Dog get some new gadgets for the team; the posse hunts a fugitive who is known for her temper, finally capturing her after tracking her through rural Hawaii.

programme.desc: Dog sets out to bring in four outlaws; day turns into night making it risky targeting their homes.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh and Rick run into Alex and decide to convoy north together; Alex surprises Hugh with a late Christmas present; Lisa and Tony haul record wide loads; Maya gets into trouble on Koyukuk's steep grades.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dave is at odds again with his bosses; Maya faces freezing brakeline issues; Hugh hauls 30 tons of boulders across Lake Winnipeg; Rick takes the sidelines with truck repairs; Tony and Lisa honor a fallen trucker.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa and Maya help a stranded driver get back on the road; Tony gets a surprise from Carlile; Dave continues his descent into isolation; Hugh and Rick keep up their load count with backhauls; Alex deals with unstable freight.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Two pursuit suspects arrested after crashing truck in North Hollywood.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: Pursuit ends with dramatic crash; driver arrested.

programme.title: Car Chase
programme.desc: The police chase a stolen big rig on a freeway.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Sesongens første store stein fraktes tilbake til leiren og legges under sagen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin gjør et krav etter et omfattende jadefunn, men andre gruvearbeidere nærmer seg stadig.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudias nye partnerskap lider når Justin og mannskapet distraheres med å forsøke transportere en gigantisk stein som kan være verdt en formue.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter å kommet på kant med forretningspartnerne kjemper Claudia og Robin for å restarte gruvedriften ved Wolverine, men blir stengt ned som følge av en overraskende hindring.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet kjemper for å få Dynasty driften i gang til tross for sviktende utstyr.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin og Mike sliter med sprekker og med hverandre mens de prøver å bevise effektiviteten i metodene sine for utålmodige investorer.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alan kommer tilbake fra Kina og gir Justin og Mike en realitetssjekk om jaden de graver ut.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin og Mike kjemper mot snø og frosset vann for å grave ut den ene potensielt verdigfulle jadeplaten - Big Fin.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Vinteren ankommer Dynasty. Mannskapet sliter og graver helt til siste slutt.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia finansierer gruvesesongen alene og er bestemt på å starte jakten på jade en måned tidligere. Claudia blir tvunget til å revurdere strategien sin når snø og høyvann hindrer mannskapet på veien.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: The Killer Meteors NO
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 7
programme.desc: The contestants demonstrate their acting skills in milk commercials before taking part in a photoshoot inspired by classic children's stories.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 8
programme.desc: Journalist Hilary Alexander quizzes the would-be catwalk stars on the industry they are so eager to become part of. The winners are treated to a party with former contestants including last year's winner Letitia Herod.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 9
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson enrols the seven remaining contestants in a Fashion Targets Breast Cancer catwalk event for their biggest showcase yet and they also take part in a beauty shoot with a cosmetics company.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 10
programme.desc: The six remaining girls arrive in Barbados and hit the waves for a surfing-themed tourism advert. The action remains on the water for a boat-based photoshoot with Dannii Minogue and a leading hair-care brand, ahead of the dreaded elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 11
programme.desc: The final five star in a music video with Bajan pop group Cover Drive and have to learn a complicated dance routine, before Elle Macpherson challenges the contestants to model jewellery in a photoshoot set in a limestone cavern.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: You're Enemy #1
programme.desc: Sladderen tar fyr og ryktene går etter en skandaløs hendelse med Brody og Stephanie. Audrina blir sjokkert da Justin tar med en hakesleppende date til middagen.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Are We Exclusive?
programme.desc: Kaitlynn & Brody's 'A-liste'-galla splitter gruppen når hun ekskluderer deler av gjengen. Audrina overrasker alle med en nytenning av en lidenskapelig romanse med en gammel flamme. Spencer forbløffer Heidi med en overdådig overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: This Hangover Better Be Expensive
programme.desc: Forholdet til Brody og Kaitlynn er stadig anstrengende og de går til en fertilitetsspesialist. Heidi og Spencer forbereder seg for sin kommende wow-fornyelse med duellerende utdrikningslag. Brandon har vanskelig for å definere det nye forholdet.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Datingen fortsetter når Bobby og Bayley drar på 'hjerte til hjerte'-date. Aarons hode blir fordreid, men vil han gå fra Daisy? Tre nyankomne får villaen til å ryste i grunnvollene og noen må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Heartbreak And Happiness
programme.desc: Aaron bryter med Daisy, men kan han vinne Dominikas hjerte? En ny eks ankommer og truer med å ødelegge Bobby og Bayleys forhold.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Departure
programme.desc: Bobbys hjerte knuses av Bayley og Daisy er bare glad for å plukke opp bitene. Aaron fortsetter å ligge etter Dominika og en VIP-ankomst skaper drama i villaen når et par må dra hjem.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Ex On The Beach er tilbake! Åtte heite single får snart ødelagt tidenes ferie når en av eksene deres ankommer og ødelegger festen! Hat, krangler, tårer, drama, følelser og enda flere ekser!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: To ekser har ankommet villaen og skaper kaos - og det blir verre. Rogans forhold til Anita kan stå i fare for å ødelegges når eksen Jess ankommer. Mere kjærlighet, mere hat - og framfor alt: flere eks-kjærester!

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Tre ekser har ankommet huset og det blir mer og mer spent. Kayleigh får vite at venninnen hennes Loren har kysset eksen hennes Adam, og når to ekser kommer samtidig får vi se et velkjent ansikt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Fem ekser befinner seg i villaen og alle er på tuppa etter at Gaz fra Geordie Shore kom dit. Gary prøver seg på Anita og de faller for hverandre, men eksen som knuste hjertet hennes, dukker opp av havet. Imens har Adam en helt forferdelig dag.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach
programme.desc: Joes ankomst sjokkerer alle og Anita blir helt ødelagt. Kayleigh lager drama og forteller Joe at Anita har rotet med to av guttene. Neste eks er et velkjent ansikt som kan ødelegge for Gaz og Anita. Velkommen Charlotte!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Logans Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. Logan ruller hjem med basketgulv og lakk i to farger.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1992 Honda Civic
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet Christines Honda Civic. Tre dager etter at avsnittet med Christine ble sendt, døde en nær slektning av magekreft.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1990 Mitsubishi Mirage
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Antwons Mitsubishi Mirage. Antwon ruller hjem på 18-tommersdekk og med et akvarium i baksetet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Are You The One?: Reunion Special
programme.desc: Alle de tjue deltakere blir gjenforent med Ryan Devlin for å diskutere hva som skjedde på Hawaii, og vi får se tidligere ikke vist materiale, sjokkerende avsløringer og sladder om parene som fortsatt er sammen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Are You The One? Special Delivery
programme.desc: Deltagerne i sesong en gjenforenes for den største hendelsen i Ethans og Ambers liv - en baby! Finn ut hvordan det har gått med deltagerne mens de tilbringer en vill helg sammen for å feire babyen med et AYTO-gavedryss.

programme.title: Are You The One?: One Too Many
programme.desc: Ti perfekt matchede gutter og jenter bli sjokkerte når de får vite at denne sesongen blir tøffere enn de trodde - ettersom det kommer en jente nummer 11. Paris og Pratt legger planer for å slippe sannhetsboksen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: The Truth Will Cost You
programme.desc: Laget blir spent når både Layton og Shelby havner i kjærlighetstriangler. Gutta graver opp ting om jentene i en konkurranse som kan sende den ellevte jenta til sannhetsbåsen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Virgin Tears
programme.desc: Det gråtes når Shelby avslutter kjærlighetstriangelen sin. John prøver å nærme seg Christina, men blir stadig blokkert av Brandon, hennes ikke-match. Gjengen blir sjokkert når de hører at det er en jomfru blandt dem.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Loose Lips Sink Relationships
programme.desc: En tabbe begått i beruset tilstand kan splitte det sterkeste paret i huset. Anthony sjekker opp dama Layton er forelsket i, Jenni. John prøver seg endelig på Christina. Parseremonien snur oppned på huset.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Trouble brews in the Red team, with Amber questioning their choice of head chef. The challenge sees the teams tackling a reception for newlyweds, before a difficult service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating Mexican dishes, but only one can enjoy a treat, with the others having to clean out the animal pens. Later, a shock is in store at service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to put a twist on some classic Italian dishes, with a top reward for the winning group and a morale-sapping punishment for the losers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs pair up and taste dishes containing both a land and sea element; the team who identifies all proteins correctly, with the fastest time, wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Back at Hell's Kitchen, the chefs receive a surprise phone call from Chef Ramsay saying that there is no dinner service, but someone will be going home.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Nattens ondskap
programme.desc: I sinne overfor den hvite mann for å ha forstyrret en urgammel indianergravplass står en ond medisinmann opp fra de døde for å terrorisere de ansvarlige.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Endelig rettferd
programme.desc: Når han oppdager at en av mennene som drepte foreldrene hans aldri ble stilt for retten, finner Walker et vitne og leter etter gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Lynsjing
programme.desc: Når en småbymobb klandrer en gutt for drapet på en godt likt kvinne og medborger, kalles Walker inn for å hindre mobben i å lynsje gutten mens han prøver å bevise hans uskyld.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Rafting, del 1 / Rafting, del 2
programme.desc: Alex tar Walker med på raftingtur, men ferien tar en dødelig vending.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Destiny's Child, Taylor Hawkins, P.O.D.
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of P.O.D., Destiny's Child and Taylor Hawkins with Chad Smith.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Snoop Dogg, LIT and Silkk the Shocker.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Pamela Anderson, K - CI, Jojo
programme.desc: Starting in sunny Southern California, Cribs pays a visit to Pamela Anderson's spectacular beach-front home.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Moby, Xzibit, Brett Michaels
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Moby, Bret Michaels and Xzibit.

programme.title: Made: Mixed Martial Artists
programme.desc: Sabrina and Jenna are best friends and the biggest girly girls in their school. They want to shed their spoiled images and be MADE into tough, disciplined Mixed Martial Artists.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Robot
programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing, with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Musical comedy star Sally Ann Howes plays a dramatic role as a guest member of the IMF when it sets out to foil a plot to ruin a friendly country with counterfeit money on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Double Circle
programme.desc: Guest star Anne Francis joins the IMF when it sets out to prevent destruction of a secret formula vital to America's missile defense system on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Submarine
programme.desc: To locate a hoard of stolen money, the IMF takes the one man who knows its hiding place (guest star Stephen McNally) on a bizarre submarine voyage on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Brothers
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Southwest Jutland
programme.desc: Tareq visits Sydvestjylland – a unique area in Denmark filled with endless contrasts. Many food innovators are using the surrounding environment to take old traditions and apply them to the 21st century.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Newbies Throw A Party
programme.desc: Marnie er kjempespent når en ny deltager kommer, men Aaron vil at hun skal ta en tøff beslutning. Marty gir ikke opp om Elettra, men Chloe har andre planer. Gaz gir nykommerne den ultimate testen: En hjemmefest.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Newbies Get Cut
programme.desc: Huset er i sjokk etter at Marnie stakk da Aaron og Chelsea fant sammen. Elettra og Marty barker sammen om badekarsflørten og Chloe provoserer Marty til bristepunktet. Gaz har brutale nyheter til nykommerne.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Scott Returns
programme.desc: Sjefen Anna har sendt gjengen til Tignes i de franske Alpene for å stå på ski. Scotty T er tilbake og legger straks an på nykommerne. Og når Anna avslører sin nyeste plan for de nye arbeiderne, blir Marty misfornøyd.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Conflicting Feelings
programme.desc: Det er en ubehagelig stemning mellom nykommerne. Scotty T og Abbie finner sammen, og Sarah er ikke glad for det. Zahida blåser seg opp mot Marty, og Gary tar hevn på Sam. Marnie er tilbake og drikker seg dritings, som ødelegger for Aaron.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Scott's Up To Something
programme.desc: Det er siste dagen i pisten. Aaron er på sjekkeren med sin wingman Gaz, Abbie og Sarah konkurrerer om Scotty T., og det blir enda verre når han prøver seg på Zahida.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Another Newbie Gets Cut
programme.desc: Gjengen drar tilbake til huset og gir nykommerne den verste oppgaven hittil - å suge på tåa til Chloe! Zahida og Scotty kommer hverandre nærmere, men klarer de å holde det hemmelig? Sjefen Anna har store nyheter, og en blir sendt hjem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 405
programme.desc: Følg Mike, Ronnie, Sammi, Vinny og Deena når de diskuterer starten på sesong fire - med all sin dramatikk og løsslupne humor. Få innsideinformasjon om Deenas ville sjekkinger og se gjengen gjenoppta krangelen som møtte veggen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 407
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Snooki, Jenni, Deena og Mike treffes for å diskutere Mikes påståtte beleiring av Snooki, for ikke å snakke om hva som skjedde mellom lakenene med Kjøttbollelaget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 409
programme.desc: Bli med Snooki, Jenni, Pauly og Vinni når de snakker om de overraskende ettervirkningene av Jionnis store krangel med Snooki. Og du får en smugkikk på det som kommer resten av sesongen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: Etter en sommer full av åpning og knusing av flasker, hjertesorg, 'lesbiotiske' kollisjoner og bilkollisjoner og drama som møter i veggen - gjenforenes gjengen for å åpne gamle sår og ta farvel med Firenze i dette eksplosive gjensynet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: JAG: The Imposter
programme.desc: Harm is held captive by Palmer, a renegade government agent with whom he had crossed swords a few months ago. While Palmer prepares a life mask so he can pass for Harm, he explains his plans to assassinate the key witness in the trial.

programme.title: JAG: To Russia With Love
programme.desc: With evidence that his missing father could still be alive in, Harm convinces the Admiral to give him time off so he can go to Russia. In Moscow, they are questioned by Mark Falcon, the KGB agent who had stolen a list of POW's earlier from Harm.

programme.title: JAG: Gypsy Eyes
programme.desc: Unable to lose the pursuing Russian fighters, Harm's and Mac’s hijacked Mig is shot out of the sky over Siberia.

programme.title: JAG: Act of Terror
programme.desc: When Arab terrorists attach a mine to a US Navy warship in an attempt to sink it, Marine guards are able to kill one and capture the other, even after the mine explodes, killing two sailors.

programme.title: JAG: The Black Jet
programme.desc: Harm and Mac are sent to Teheran, Iran to represent a Navy flier whose Stealth jet crashed in Iran due to a major mechanical failure.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery
programme.desc: An advice columnist neglects her husband to devote all her time to her fans, prompting him to seek affection elsewhere. A man with a negative history with Capt. Stubing fills in for the ailing chef.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please
programme.desc: In a Christmas-themed cruise, the captain worries about how to effectively lead his ship but be a friend to his crew as well. A married couple who outwardly appear happy and in love are both desperate for the other person to give them a divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle
programme.desc: A woman who believes her departed dad was a noble sea captain forms an attachment for a devilish old purser; a newlywed couple are prevented by dislocated backs, sunburn, and even poison ivy from enjoying their honeymoon.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time
programme.desc: Isaac's possessive mother becomes jealous of her son's lady friend, while he objects to his mom sharing a cabin with her latest boyfriend; a divorced comedy team is too busy making jokes to admit they miss each other.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Gun
programme.desc: MacGyver must aid a member of the Challenge Center who has been implicated in the shooting death of a police officer.

programme.title: MacGyver: Twenty Questions
programme.desc: When a fifteen-year-old alcoholic is accused of murder, she turns to MacGyver for help.

programme.title: MacGyver: Harry's Will
programme.desc: MacGyver inherits a vintage car and a whole lot of trouble when his grandfather passes away.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Wall
programme.desc: MacGyver travels to East Berlin in search of a friend’s lost granddaughter.

programme.title: MacGyver: Lesson in Evil
programme.desc: After testifying against him in his bid for freedom, MacGyver becomes the target of an escaped mass murderer.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cult
programme.desc: Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock: The Priest
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness
programme.desc: Ben Matlock gives his assistant, Michelle Thomas, her toughest courtroom assignment... breaking down the eyewitness testimony of a former law classmate in a brutal murder case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Best Seller
programme.desc: District Attorney Julie March matches wits with tempestuous author Cynthia Slayton, whose torrid novels are suddenly eclipsed by facts surrounding the death of her best friend.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A tense situation erupts into a hotbed of chaos! While awaiting treatment from Dr. Sloan, convicted criminal John Dunbar unexpectedly jumps his guards and seizes a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ronnie Magro's Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen kjemper Deena og romkameratene mot kreft. Spiralgjengen diskuterer meningen med livet. Og en mystisk telefonsamtale fra Jen gjør Ronnies liv enda mer dramatisk.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The United States vs. The Situation Part 1
programme.desc: Denne gangen samles de for å støtte sin bror, Mike. Dette er uken da dommen for skatteunndragelsen faller. Jwowws ekteskap krakelerer, men hun snakker heller om Angelinas forhold enn sitt eget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The United States vs. The Situation Part 2
programme.desc: Hva er et passende rettssalsantrekk? Hvorfor har Ronnie en blåveis? Og hvor lang straff får Mike for skatteunndragelse?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Secaucus!
programme.desc: Følelsene slår enhver rekord da alle prøver å samle seg etter de sjokkerende detaljene rundt Mikes straffeutmåling.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Dude Ranch
programme.desc: Med Mikes straffeutmåling bak seg, drar romkameratene nordover til en kompis ranch for en helgeutflukt. Guido-familien forsøker å fiske, Snooki drikker som en fisk og Ronnie forteller spøkelseshistorier foran leirbålet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ranchelor Party
programme.desc: Jentene inviterer Lauren-familien til kompisens ranch for Mikes overraskelse utdrikningslag. Imidlertid har Pauly og Vinny selv utvidet invitasjonen til en gjeng med strippere. Det oppstår en situasjon!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The former Iron Chef Michiba decides that Morimoto needs some help finding his feet, so he recruits his number one sous-chef from his own days at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Japan's culinary media is dominated by today's challenger, a food critic, musician and graphic artist. Kentaro is determined to make a name for himself at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The Iron Chef Italian is challenged by a chef hailing from Kyoto who never ceases to pack his restaurant with customers.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Morimoto fights a traditionalist chef who fills his dishes with nostalgia.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Meiji Kinenkan is the oldest bridal hall in Japan undergoing an upgrade to celebrate its 50th anniversary. This includes the addition of a Chinese restaurant and its new grand chef.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at uhell elsker selskap i 'Du blir med meg', strever med vekter i 'Verstinger med vekstang' og møter noen fryktelig glade papper i 'Overentusiastiske fedre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Spydspunktet
programme.desc: Etter at en Commonwealth-planet er angrepet av pyriske pyroformere, blir Dylan tvunget til å kjempe for å beskytte den nye planeten.

programme.title: Andromeda: Himmelhvelvet
programme.desc: Dylan hører stemmer som tilsier ham til en planet med 'ild og is'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Deep Midnight's Voice
programme.desc: Mens han er fanget i en kamp mellom to Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter, fanger mannskapet en fiendtlig som hevder at stoltheten hans har et kart over slipstream.

programme.title: Andromeda: Illusjonen av majestet
programme.desc: En feil sving etter å ha gått ut av en slipstream sender Andromeda inn i Prolon-systemet. De redder en fluktpute fra en viss katastrofe, men stoltheten vil ha den tilbake.

programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: Mannskapet søker en tapt koloni av Nietzscheans og oppdager et annet mannskap som i det skjulte har hjulpet dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dommens dag, Vredens dag
programme.desc: Mannskapet installerer en ny AI i et nytt Commonwealth-slagskip, og naturlig nok går ikke ting som de skal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue ? a flaw on a mailing envelope ? exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: How did the stalker obtain the security system code for his victim's home? How did he steal her personal photographs? Police needed answers and they found them in the most unlikely of places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: After inspecting storm damage to a home in Tampa, an insurance assessor simply disappeared. Thirty hours later, her body was found in a nearby river. But the killer had been careless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Maneuver
programme.desc: When a hit-and-run accident claimed the life of a high school athlete, everyone in town mourned his passing. Finding the killer was a long shot at best.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dial A For Abduction, Alamo Treasure, Deadly RX, Harold and Ma, Update: Mrs. Millionaire and Dates.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: Vegas Rapist, CIA Secrets, Lady in Black, Realtor Murder, Update: The Dale and Fawzi's Son.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Anastasia Pts 1 & 2, J.D. Method, Interstate Disappearance and Glendeen's Goal.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Two for the Road, Boston Healer, Niqui Bride, Bad Dad, Update: Baby Broker and Amazon Women.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Money Clip Murder, Arson King, Mummy's Curse, Update: Honky Tonk Woman, Wiseguy Wannabe and Peggy's Brother.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Wasted Youth
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Crimes Of Passion
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Raw Greed
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Secrets
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Celebrity Special - The Black Horse in Pluckley Village
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by reality TV star Charlie Doherty in the most haunted village in the UK and investigate the most haunted pub in the UK, The Black Horse.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Piano Plays a Ghost Song
programme.desc: Following reports of loud voices and footsteps heard when no one else is around, staff seeing dark shadows fleeting through the empty corridors, to several pianos playing by themselves, Ghost Dimension head into Champness Hall.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by a special guest as they investigate an abandoned home full of spirits in Liverpool.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension encounter something paranormal in this exclusive unseen footage from their invetsigation of the Soul Less House in Liverpool.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did The Babysitter Abuse My Child?
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: We Can't Live Like This
programme.desc: Thornton says he can't trust his cheating girlfriend Crystal and wants her to take a lie detector test! Plus, Stephanie wants to prove to her husband Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member! She wants the accusations put to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm Raising Him, But Is He Mine?
programme.desc: Deshawn claims that his ex Lynette abandoned their 5-year-old son. But she claims that he is keeping her from their child. However, Deshawn recently found out that he isn't listed on his son's birth certificate, so he wants a DNA test!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A retired military officer is found dead in his own backyard during a freak ice storm in San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G. has just graduated from medical school and is set to begin her first job as an M.E. in Jacksonville, Florida when a high-profile case challenges her to use her newly acquired skills.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Manny Alvarez mysteriously crashes his car into a fence. He dies en route to the hospital, leaving behind a wife and son. It is up to Dr. G to find out what cut this young man’s life short.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A diabetic man dies after a night out. Meanwhile, an elderly man's decomposing body is found in his son’s home. Dr. G realizes that finding the causes of death will be anything but straightforward.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Trail
programme.desc: The disappearance of young women triggered a search that spanned the Pacific Northwest. A massive media campaign failed to locate the drifter, who first charmed then killed them. As investigators followed his trail, he always stayed one step ahead.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Kelly Osbourne
programme.desc: Kelly Osbourne enlists psychic medium Kim Russo to help her solve a series of paranormal mysteries she experienced at a notoriously haunted Hollywood hotel.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories: Taye Diggs
programme.desc: Taye Diggs returns to a New York City theatre with psychic medium Kim Russo to investigate an unforgettable paranormal encounter he experienced years ago.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Beverley Mitchell
programme.desc: In this episode, Beverley Mitchell ("7th Heaven") returns to Pennhurst Asylum to find answers about the ghosts at Pennhurst.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Eric Mabius
programme.desc: For the first time in years, Eric Mabius (Resident Evil, Ugly Betty) returns to Allaire Village to confront the ghost.

programme.title: The Haunting Of. . .: Connie Stevens
programme.desc: Connie and her daughter Joely Fisher have shared their home with a ghost for a long time. Kim accompanies both women.

programme.title: Andromeda: Pitiless as the Sun
programme.desc: Andromeda svarer på et nødanrop når et lasteskip blir angrepet

programme.title: Andromeda: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren
programme.desc: Mannskapet ser etter en mistet Commonwealth-leder som har skjult seg.

programme.title: Andromeda: Altfor menneskelig
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka og Trance går sammen med Rommie for å finne ut om et våpen som utvikles på en planet som mistro AI.

programme.title: Mutant X: Time Squared
programme.desc: Ashlocke går tilbake i tid for å prøve å gjøre seg uovervinnelig ved å gi noe til sitt yngre jeg, og får Brennan og Shalimar til å følge ham.

programme.title: Mutant X: Whose Woods These Are
programme.desc: Teamet drar ut i villmarken for å spore et drapsmanndyr som er rettet mot turgåere.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Future Revealed
programme.desc: Ashlocke er desperat etter å finne en kur mot sin dødelige tilstand og infiltrerer Sanctuary for å utpresse Adam for å få tak i motgiften.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Deception
programme.desc: Officers investigate the death of a father of four who was gunned down, however nothing about the crime is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered while walking her dogs. Investigators suspect her killer is someone she knew. Twenty-six years latter police make an arrest but is he the right man?

programme.title: On the Case: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy is murdered in his bed in the middle of the night. Police suspect the child's mother. Over the next 9 years there will be accusations, a confession and a conviction but will justice be served?

programme.title: On the Case: Veil of Suspicion
programme.desc: A beloved husband and father is found executed in front of his home.

programme.title: On the Case: Twice Is No Accident
programme.desc: When Fran Smith mysteriously disappears her sister and daughter mount their own investigation... What they uncover sends police on a cross country man hunt for a killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely murdered, police must retrace her last steps alive to identify her killer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Change of Seasons
programme.desc: When her husband quits after a blowout with Joe, Kelly is put in a terrible position. Will she stay at Buffalo - or will she go? Scott gets the news he must stand down from flying so another co-pilot can fast-track to captain.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Up In the Air
programme.desc: After her husband's acrimonious departure from Buffalo, Kelly has a confrontation that decides whether she, too, will quit. Jeremy makes a mistake that could end his Buffalo career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day
programme.desc: Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender
programme.desc: James Corden gets candid on hosting a daily show. Drew dives into the world of dating apps enlisting a dating expert to share tips in the latest installment of “Drew’s Love Bug.” Drew gives a curated list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong
programme.desc: "Archenemy" star Joe Manganiello chats with Drew. Drew shares some never before seen moments from her chat with Adam Sandler. Personal finance expert Carmen Rita Wong shares tips. Drew tries out some weird food combos with TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: John Boyega, Drew's News, In A Minute with Bill Nye 60 Second Experiment
programme.desc: "The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Queen Latifah, Chris Appleton, Mikel Welch, Drew's News
programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jessica Biel, Drew's News with Derek Blasberg
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Fat Joe,Drew's News with Natasha Leggero
programme.desc: Fat Joe talks about his memoir, "The Book of Jose," with Drew. Natasha Leggero covers news with Drew and Ross, discussing memory after childbirth and "sitter-vising." Fat Joe and Leo Kelly make caterpillars from old socks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: David Duchovny, Drew's News with Kirby Howell-Baptiste
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A young banker named David Harmon was bludgeoned to death in his bed. Investigators came to believe that Melinda was involved in a secret affair with family friend Mark Mangelsdorf, and that the two were involved in David’s murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Into Thin Air
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Jeanette Louise Zapata, who mysteriously vanished without a trace from her home in Wisconsin on October 11, 1976, leaving behind her daughter Linda, and two other children.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed the Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: In 2005, a college student and aspiring beauty queen Nona Dirksmeyer was found murdered inside her apartment. Police believed Nona's boyfriend flew into a murderous rage when he discovered a condom wrapper on her kitchen counter.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peace, Love and Murder
programme.desc: A report on the murder of housewife Toni Heartsong, killed in her Jupiter, Florida home on in 2000. Her husband was initially eliminated as a possible suspect, but in 2006, new DNA technology revealed the presence of his blood under Toni's thumbnail.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Vegas Heat
programme.desc: A report on the 2005 discovery of the charred corpse of a young woman, found in a burned-out car on a Las Vegas desert road. The car was registered to Kelly Ryan, a fitness champion who is married to Craig Titus, a Mr. Olympia competitor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Peter Chadwick: Caught
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Organized Crime
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a dispute between siblings gets out of hand, a man struggles to keep his story straight with the police, and deputies investigate a domestic incident.

programme.title: Cops: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
programme.desc: The K-9 unit tracks down a man fleeing on foot, a father is left with no choice but to call the cops on his son, and a former gang member is found with a stolen firearm.

programme.title: Cops: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: A deputy calls for backup when he's outnumbered, a former Marine damages his neighbors' property, and a husband and wife are separated after their vehicle is searched.

programme.title: Cops: One Headlight
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: Cops: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: Cops: Manic Monday
programme.desc: A wanted man attempts to hide at his grandmother's house, police arrest a suspect driving a stolen vehicle, and officers call animal control for an injured dog.

programme.title: Cops: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: Cops: Heat of the Moment
programme.desc: A parolee leads deputies on a high-speed chase, police respond to a domestic disturbance call, and an officer helps frustrated citizens settle their differences.

programme.title: Cops: Cookies and Contraband
programme.desc: A detective is injured after chasing a man driving a stolen car, a bar fight ends with a couple in handcuffs, and an officer finds a variety of items during a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: An alleged lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation, and officers question a colorful trio of suspects.

programme.title: Cops: Bikini Brawl
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Hanging On Houseboat (Aubry case)
programme.desc: Dominique Aubry, a rich widow of 58, is found hanged on her barge in Neuilly. It appears that since the death of her husband on a trip to Mauritius, Dominique Aubry has been ailing.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Only DNA Can Say - Angélique Dumetz
programme.desc: On February 23th 2017, policemen are alerted of the disapearrance of Brigitte Troadec, her husband Pascal, and their children Sébastien and Charlotte.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Jean-Raymond Blatti Case
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written \"DIRTY RAPIST\".

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)
programme.desc: Police in Strasbourg receive a startling emergency call from Doctor Jean-Louis Muller, a forensic pathologist well known in the region.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Christophe Lejard Case
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. An execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of a quiet family man.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 203
programme.desc: Den tidligere artisten, flammeslukeren og TV-danseren Julio Kopseng lever et omsvermet liv i Oslos dansemiljø. Da han blir anmeldt for en voldtekt i 2013 utløses et skred av voldtektsanmeldelser mot ham.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 104
programme.desc: 10. august 2019 opplevde Norge nok et rystende terrorangrep. 21 år gamle Philip Manshaus dreper først sin 17 år gamle stesøster. Bevæpnet, og med uniform går han deretter til angrep mot Al-Noor moskeen i Bærum.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 101
programme.desc: Anne Elisabeth Hagen forsvinner sporløst fra sitt hjem høsten 2018. På en rød stol finner ektemann og milliardær, Tom Hagen et trusselbrev og krav om løsepenger.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Den 15. mai 2018 ble politiet i Örebro varslet om at Lena Wesström, en trebarnsmor, var forsvunnet fra hjemmet sitt. Et vitne hevder å ha hørt hjerteskjærende skrik fra en kvinne samme natt som Lena forsvant.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 202
programme.desc: Tidlig en søndag morgen i 2004 er den 22 år gamle sykepleierstudenten Anne Slåtten på vei til jobb, men hun dukker aldri opp. Etter et døgn blir hun funnet drept i. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av den omsorgsfulle jenta?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Crazy as a Soup Sandwich
programme.desc: A man sells his soul to a demon for some racing tips. After being terrified by the demon he goes for help from the criminal boss he borrowed the track money from

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Special Service
programme.desc: A man finds that his life has been on TV for the past five years

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Showdown with Rance McGrew
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Kick the Can
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Piano in the House
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Rites of Jeff Myrtlebank
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Comedian
programme.desc: Comedian Samir Wassan (Kumail Nanjiani) wants to be famous...but at what cost?

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 30,000 Feet
programme.desc: Journalist Justin Sanderson (Adam Scott) finds the fate of Flight 1015 in his hands.

programme.desc: Israel Adesanya is one of the UFC's most accomplished and dominant fighters. Can he beat the wings of death?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Queen of comedy Leslie Mann takes on the wings death and calls out "Hot Ones" creator Chris Schonberger.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Paul Rudd Does a Historic Dab While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Paul Rudd is an actor, writer and producer who has been in some of the most beloved films and TV shows.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Kevin Love Gets Dunked On By Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Cleveland Cavaliers player Kevin Love may cruise through the NBA but can he cruise through wings of death?

programme.desc: Matt Damon is an Academy Award-winning actor from "Saving Private Ryan," the Bourne film series and more.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chrissy Teigen Gets Drunk on Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones: Anthony Mackie Quotes Shakespeare While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones: Liam Payne Gets Cocky Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: One Direction's Liam Payne bravely wears a cream-colored shirt, tempting fate and the dry cleaner.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Jacob Elordi stars as Nate Jacobs in the Emmy Award-winning HBO series "Euphoria."

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The historic one-armed bandits; cutting edge, computerized slot machines; some of the wackiest vending machines; binoculars at popular tourist sites; a unique company that collects and cleans the coins thrown into fountains.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They're the meat in our sandwiches and slices of American pop culture; take a look behind the deli counter to reveal the secret ingredients in boloney; watch a master sausage maker craft salami, and pile it on at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Copper transports electricity, water, and heat while being essential for survival yet killing microbes; this versatile metal conducts electricity globally, revolutionizes electronics, forms plumbing pipes, creates beautiful roofs, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cotton caused a civil war and jump-started the Industrial Revolution while becoming the world's most ubiquitous fabric; a chronicle of cotton's journey from dirt to shirt.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Today's cowboys blend Old West traditions with modern technology; examine 19th-century cattle industry boom, Spanish-derived saddles and ropes, barbed wire revolution, and modern computer chips, DNA evidence, and artificial insemination techniques.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Delves into the little-known, hugely important, multi-billion-dollar industry of product testing, where wrinkles get ironed out and goods are stripped of marketing and hype to see if they work; meet product testers who serve as truth squads.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Tanks have transformed warfare since their debut a century ago. Host Wil Willis traces their evolution from World War One breakthroughs to modern marvels like the M1 Abrams, the world's most powerful Main Battle Tank.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Could the mighty M2 be the greatest machine gun in history? Nicknamed “Ma Deuce”, this American machine gun has dominated battlefields for over 80 years. Host Wil Willis tests it and recreates Audie Murphy’s famous Medal of Honor moment.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan continues its suicidal resistance, and invading it looks costly. After 2 atomic bombs, the Emperor intervenes and stops the War. Stalin grabs territory in East Asia. The War is over, and the Atomic Era and the Cold War start.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: France and Spain: The Pyrenees
programme.desc: Monty treks one of the toughest and most famous freedom trails out of Nazi controlled France, taking him through the valleys and high ridges of the Pyrenees mountains and into Spain.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Vidkun Quisling
programme.desc: Vidkun Quisling, once honored for diplomacy, turned traitor by collaborating with Nazis. His bid for power in Norway failed, relegated by Germans. Despite being named "fuehrer," his reign led to repression until his hanging post-Nazi defeat.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Devil's Due
programme.desc: During WWII, Greek Prime Ministers Tsolakoglou, Logothetopoulos, and Rallis collaborated with Nazi occupiers, imposing fees that caused a famine.
