programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a new type of challenge when the restaurant is closed for chef Ramsay's daughter's 21st birthday party; one team rises to the occasion, while the other serves up its biggest disappointment thus far.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs go head-to-head, each cooking up a different international cuisine against a chef from the opposing team; Ramsay kicks a chef out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs compete in a tag team relay race competition, in which they must cook entrées against the other team; five chefs face the first "Cook For Your Life" challenge of the season.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: One team struggles to work together on its dish; during a special charity dinner service, both teams make big mistakes, and one chef gets heated over who should be put on the chopping block.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on the blind taste test challenge with messy consequences; one team comes unglued during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs jump back into the dating game on hkchefsonly.com, hoping to swipe right on the perfect match of ingredients for their dish; the stakes are high during a special steak night dinner service; one team struggles with overcooking its dish.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Moskva-forbindelsen
programme.desc: En rekke lagerran leder Walker og Trivette til en russisk mafiasjef, og rangerne innkaller Moskva-politiet for å identifisere og fakke skurken.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Mirakel i Middle Creek
programme.desc: En seksåring faller ned i et 12 meter dypt avløp, og Walker prøver å redde ham. Men når hullet raser sammen, blir Walker og gutten sittende fast uten mye til håp.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Æresgalleriet
programme.desc: Kvelden før C.D. skal innlemmes i Texas Rangers’ Æresgalleri hjemsøker en seriemorder fra en 11 år gammel sak ham, og han begynner å tvile på om han fortjener æren.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Høyere makter
programme.desc: Walker prøver å holde en familie samlet etter at en tibetansk munk oppdager at ånden til Lama Dolgin har blitt reinkarnert som en ung gutt og prøver å ta gutten med til Tibet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Patriot
programme.desc: Når Walker og Trivette arresterer lederen for en høyreekstrem gruppe, hevner gruppen seg ved å ta Alex og de ansatte ved en minoritetseid TV-stasjon som gissel.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Ebony fra Colorado Springs tar militærutdanning, men må bytte ut uniformen med mammaklær. Hun og kjæresten Josh vil inn i flyvåpenet, men en baby kan hindre dem i å verve seg, eller til og med i å fullføre skolen.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Sørstatsjenta Whitney er familiens baby, men da både hun og moren blir gravide, blir det for fullt i huset. Whitney og kjæresten Weston må flytte ut og stifte sin egen familie.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Den 16 år gamle småbyjenta Catelynn er fornuftens røst i en ellers ilter familie. Med støtte fra kjæresten Tyler bestemmer hun seg for adopsjon uten foreldrenes samtykke.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Crane
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Death Squad
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Butterfly
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Homecoming
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's First Date
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake og går berserk i Tenerife, og det er ikke bare været som er hett! Steph er på sjekkeren, og etter å ha blitt slitt mellom Chloe og Abbie, fortsetter Sam å leke med ilden, noe som fører til overveldende konsekvenser.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tenerife Was A 10
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake på Tenerife, og det er ikke bare været som er heit! Etter å ha bestemt seg for at han foretrekker Chloe, tar Sam henne med på paraseiling-date - men vil forholdet deres nå nye høyder?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chicken Shop Date
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake i Newcastle etter turen til Tenerife, og lite action driver Sophie og Nathan til nye nivåer av kåthet! Sam er ute etter å imponere Chloe, men det går ikke lang tid før noen griner og samholdet slår sprekker.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Girls Get Spiritual
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake, og mens Nathan setter nykommerne på prøve, finner ampre venner finner til hverandre. Sophie får overraskelsesbeøk, Sam har irritert mange, og en huskamerat som har vært borte, flytter inn igjen.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The L Bomb
programme.desc: Geordie er tilbake, og hele familien er endelig gjenforent. En tur til Edinburgh fører de gamle flammene Marnie og Aaron sammen igjen, og Sam må beklage seg til Chloe. Gammelt vennskap slår sprekker når Nathan og Marnie slåss.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Barbers
programme.desc: Geordiene er tilbake, og det går ikke lang tid før gjengen drar på byen. Marnie og Nathan snakker ut, Abbie er på sjekker'n, og Sam og Chloe blir ferdige med krangelen. På byturen blir det ampert mellom bestevennene Steph og Abbie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Toxic Shots Syndrome
programme.desc: Snooki flytter ut av strandhuset for seg selv og Dina sliter uten kjøttbollen sin. Mike må takle baksiden av rehabiliteringen etter å ha fått behandling av en lege.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Blues, Balls, & Brawls
programme.desc: Jenny planlegger en overraskelsesfest på Rogers bursdag som faller litt i fisk. Deena prøver ut Danny som kjøttbolle. Vennegjengen befinner seg plutselig midt i et digert basketak på klubben og en av dem meies ned i håndgemengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Merp Walk
programme.desc: Jenny får vite omfanget av skaden sin. Mike vurderer å gå et skritt videre i forholdet til Paula. Når Deena holder kjøttbolle-auditioner, ender det med at hun selv triller ut av panna og rett ned i bålet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Let's Make it Official
programme.desc: Jenni lurer på hvordan det går mellom henne og Roger og forstår at de kanskje er verre ute og kjøre enn hun trodde. Mike vil ta forholdet med Paula et skritt videre...til han får virkeligheten i fanget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Great Meatballs of Fire
programme.desc: Mike prøver å tilpasse seg å være i et forhold, men blir forvirret rundt hvordan reglene egentlig funker. Deena går tilbake til sitt liv som kjøttbolle, men må kjempe med nebb og klør for sine festrettigheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Control the Crazy
programme.desc: Sammi konfronterer Deena med hennes kjøttbolleutbrudd og de blir stående og stange. Mike og kompisene blir kjent med Paulas "ville" side, og Mike vet ikke helt om han kan takle det.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Down to a Sunless Sea
programme.desc: Catherine fails to heed Vincent's warnings about her dangerous former law-school beau.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Fever
programme.desc: After Mouse discovers a ship's gold and gemstones treasure buried beneath the city, Vincent's community is torn apart by greed and strife.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Everything is Everything
programme.desc: A Romani boy clears his father's name and regains the love and trust of his grandparents with Vincent and Catherine's help.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: To Reign in Hell
programme.desc: Vincent prepares for a battle to the death after Catherine is kidnapped by a giant warrior.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ozymandias
programme.desc: Vincent's world Below is threatened by a massive tower being built by Elliot Burch, a former suitor of Catherine's. She agrees to marry Burch on the condition that he halt construction.

programme.title: JAG: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Mac is prosecuting a SEAL jumpmaster charged with causing the death of one of his men during a parachute insertion exercise.

programme.title: JAG: Real Deal Seal
programme.desc: Medal of Honor Navy SEAL Lt. Curtis Rivers is court-martialed for punching a Congressional candidate who claims to be a Navy SEAL.

programme.title: JAG: Overdue And Presumed Lost
programme.desc: A salvage company tries to claim rights to the wreckage of the USS Dolphin, a WW2 submarine that was lost the day before the attack on Pearl Harbor in 1941.

programme.title: JAG: A Separate Peace-Part 1
programme.desc: A few days before his promotion to the command of the Sixth Fleet, RAdm Boone, an old acquaintance of Harmon Rabb, Sr.reminisces with Cmdr Harmon Harm Rabb, Jr. about the Vietnam war. Their conversation is interrupted by SECNAV who bears shocking news.

programme.title: JAG: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 1
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marooned / The Search / Isaac's Holiday - Part 2
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Rocky / Julie's Dilemma / Who's Who?
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat: A Different Girl / The Man Who Loved Women / Oh, My Aching Brother
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Julie's Aunt / Where Is It Written? / The Big Deal
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Fair Fonzie
programme.desc: Snobby Cynthia Holmes schemes with her obnoxious cousin, Skippy, to make the Fonz look foolish at a country club soirée.

programme.title: Happy Days: Bye Bye Blackball
programme.desc: Richie, Ralph, and Potsie endure the harassment of "hell week" to prove themselves worthy to enter their college fraternity, Phi Kappa Nu.

programme.title: Happy Days: Joanie's First Kiss
programme.desc: Sophomore Joanie Cunningham gets basic back-seat defense tips from Richie and Fonzie before her first "car date" with a senior boy, and then cramps her older brother's style when she and her date show up at his college "make-out" party.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Almost Dies
programme.desc: What begins as a humorous escapade with a motorcycle turns into a tragic vigil for the Cunninghams and their friends.

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: MacGyver: Strictly Business
programme.desc: Murdoc is ordered to kill MacGyver in order to prove his loyalty to a professional hit squad.

programme.title: MacGyver: Trail of Tears
programme.desc: MacGyver is drawn into a territorial dispute between an Indian reservation and an electric power company.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Coltons
programme.desc: Using their unorthodox methods, the Coltons combine their individual talents to create a team of world-class bounty hunters in this MacGyver spinoff.

programme.title: MacGyver: Hind-Sight
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton reminisce about past adventures as Pete prepares for eye surgery to treat his Glaucoma.

programme.title: MacGyver: Obsessed
programme.desc: MacGyver and the Phoenix Foundation are overseeing the security and protection of Delasora during his trial. MacGyver is obsessed with the death of Murdoc and believes that he's still alive.

programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Student
programme.desc: A philandering college professor is murdered in his classroom and Marcy Hansen is the prime suspect, having announced her pregnancy in an argument before witnesses.

programme.title: Matlock: The Talk Show
programme.desc: Ben Matlock and Michelle Thomas are exposed to a quick course in trash television when a vicious talk show host, Don Galloway, humiliates three prominent women to boost his ratings.

programme.title: Matlock: The Victim
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is convinced that Alex Gordon, a paraplegic, murdered his wife and framed his business partner, Bret Howell, for the crime.

programme.title: Matlock: The Kidnapper
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is kidnapped and threatened by an unknown person, or persons, who may be seeking revenge for sending them to prison.

programme.title: Matlock: The Informer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock becomes involved in a mob blackmail scheme when he defends a famous criminal lawyer, David O’Malley, accused of murdering an underworld kingpin.

programme.title: Matlock: The Informer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock must pull out all the stops to keep his client, David O’Malley, a famed criminal lawyer in his own right, in line, and the jury on his side. Meanwhile, Conrad races against time to track down an informer that will crack the case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In a grueling fight that leaves both competitors hospitalized, undefeated boxing legend, Mercury The Heat Jones loses the world middleweight title to Tommy Brackett.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Selected by Bravo Magazine as one of L.A.'s most eligible bachelors, Dr. Jack Stewart isn't aware the honor is dangerous to his health.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amidst the corridors of Community General Hospital, the hit t.v. show The New Healers is shooting their next episode.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Refusing to believe that a long-time patient, Alex Forman, committed suicide, Dr. Sloan launches his own investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: What could be more dangerous than a psychopathic killer with a taste for revenge! Eddie Gault, recently paroled, has only one thing on his mind--making Lt. Steve Sloan suffer for putting him in prison.

programme.desc: Gjengen tilbringer dagen på strandpromenaden, men vil den dvelende spenningen mellom Nicole, Jenni og Angelina ødelegge moroa?

programme.desc: Jentene fortsetter letingen etter rettferdighet i D.C. Pauly D kjører en storslagen skøyerstrek og Deena kjeder seg med Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Only in Jersey

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Varmen fra et usynlig lys
programme.desc: En eksperimentell tilsløringsenhet slipper Dylan inn i et alternativt univers.

programme.title: Andromeda: De andre
programme.desc: Andromeda blir fanget i en krig mellom to skip, og den inkluderer en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt brenner ned til aske
programme.desc: Dylan blir lurt av Rev og kidnappet. Mannskapet finner en uventet alliert i en samler.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tapt i et rom som ikke er der
programme.desc: Abyss har smittet Beka. Mannskapet må finne en måte å redde henne på.

programme.title: Andromeda: Forkortelse av djevelens skille
programme.desc: Etter at noe av mannskapet er fanget, blir Harper tvunget til å jobbe på en tidsbro for patriarken.

programme.title: Andromeda: Stoler på Gordian Maze
programme.desc: En spion fra Tri Gemma dukker opp på Andromeda i et forsøk på å stjele stjernekartet.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: The body of a young woman was found a mile from her abandoned car. Police were especially concerned when they realized the victim had come to them for protection just two weeks earlier after a road rage incident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: A young hairdresser was sexually assaulted and murdered in her own beauty salon. The evidence at the crime scene didn't match any of the suspects and, after the initial investigation, the case went cold for ten years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, In Deed
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: G.I. Guinea Pig, Bank Tunnel, Murder in the Park, Noreen Renier and Unknown Dad.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Maloney's Mickey, Picture Kristen Gone, Coma Comeback, Update: Foster Son, Police Woman Savior and Mystery Cowboy.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Miami Vice, Zel's Odyssey, Missing Rock Star, Image of Guadalupe, Update: Viet Pilot's Daughter and Drunk Driver.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Russian Roulette, Anthrax, Friendly Ghost, Update: Vanished in the Heartland and Scare Tactics.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries with Dennis Farina: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fugitive R.N., Witness for the Prosecution, Doris Duke, Update: NY State Serial Rapist, Gone Fishing and Miracle Child.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Manhunt
programme.desc: A killer was on the loose in one of America's most popular tourist destinations. Armed and desperate, he evaded law enforcement at every turn. As the Fourth of July weekend quickly approached, thousands of people became potential targets.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder For Hire
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimensions Top 10 Scariest Moments
programme.desc: A special look into the top 10 of Ghost Dimension’s scariest moments. Venturing into the UK’s most haunted buildings, we take a look back at the scariest captures.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Scars for Life
programme.desc: Could a tattoo studio be haunted? Has a Ouija board opened a gateway to the spirit dimension? Ghost Dimension spend the night investigating Deviant Ink tattoo studio.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Fort Crosby
programme.desc: Crosby Battery, also known as Crosby Point Battery and Fort Crosby, was an artillery battery situated between Crosby and Hightown in Lancashire, United Kingdom. The battery was used for port defence and anti-aircraft defence during WWII.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Passage in Time
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Big Condo Studios in Liverpool, UK. Located in one of the most haunted cities in the world and believed to be haunted by some very playful spirits. Will they join the team on their investigation tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Poltergeist House
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate a Poltergeist haunting a homeowner who is a wits end. Poltergeistal activity in the home is terrorizing the tenant and paranormal investigators Bex and Sean are about to start the exorcism of this demonic entity away for good.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Cheating Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Chris and Steve confess to cheating on their girlfriends and Michelle wants to tell her boyfriend she has a mistress. The tension is high on today's Jerry Springer Show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: My Pimp Runs My Family
programme.desc: Tracy and Allen have been living in a car. Her two older sisters are here to convince her to temporarily live with them and go back to school until he can provide for them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I'm Marrying a Transsexual!
programme.desc: Jerry is 58 years old and has had three big changes. He is currently happily engaged to a woman named Joy and speaks about his past gender confusion.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Have Many Lovers
programme.desc: Today, Rufus comes clean about cheating on Treynae with Cheeta and Rhonda tells her girlfriend Lovette that she's in an affair with another woman! Who will choose whom?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Wife Discovers Husband's Secret Family
programme.desc: Ron left Stacie when she was 8 months pregnant with his child for Audrey and thought he'd found his soul mate. Are Stacie's kids all his? Watch this classic showdown today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Jerry Rescues An Obese Man
programme.desc: Denny weighs over 800 pounds and has been unable to leave his bed for the past 5 weeks and is ready to change his life. Today we follow Denny's courageous journey.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith… in a burglar.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down for no apparent reason. The case kicks into high gear when Lt Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: A card game is interrupted by gunfire, leaving a young man dead. Lt. Joe Kenda soon learns the seeds of his destruction were sewn earlier the same day.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On August 4, 1997, the body of Christian Jambert, a retired gendarme, was discovered in his house in Auxerre. A 22 long rifle was placed on his legs.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 009
programme.desc: Allen Dorfman controlled the Teamsters' vast pension fund, financing Las Vegas and enriching the mob through illicit loans until a massive FBI operation in 1978 targeted him, leading to his bribery conviction and ultimately his assassination in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 010
programme.desc: Joe Valachi, a Mafia hitman, broke the code of silence, revealing the names of bosses and exposing the Mafia's $40 billion empire, sparking a national reckoning and empowering the FBI to escalate their battle against organized crime.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 011
programme.desc: This is the story of how Mafia serial killer Roy DeMeo evaded New York's law enforcement while allegedly committing up to 200 murders, operating under the protection of "Nino" Gaggi in the Gambino crime family.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafias Greatest Hits - Season 1 - Episode 012
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, the enigmatic Jewish-American gangster, evaded legal charges throughout his life, accumulating wealth through gambling and influential alliances, yet leaving little behind upon his death.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Covert Poisoning of An Ex-Russian Spy / The Odd Death of Charles C. Morgan
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane cover the case of a slain ex-spy and the crimes leading to the death of Charles C. Morgan.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Bizarre Disappearance of Bobby Dunbar
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take an in-depth look at the insane controversy surrounding the disappearance of Bobby Dunbar.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Treacherous Treasure Hunt of Forrest Fenn
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Shane as they attempt to track down the mysterious hidden treasure of Forest Fenn.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Eerie Case of the Watcher
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane take a look at the case of the Watcher, a mysterious stalker who terrorized his neighborhood.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Unusual Australian Shark Arm Murder
programme.desc: Follow along as hosts Ryan and Shane go down under to examine a shark, a speedboat, and a mysterious severed arm.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Suspicious Case of the Reykjavik Confessions
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss six people who confessed to murders that don't seem to have ever occurred.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Shocking Florida Machete Murder / The Puzzling Disappearance of Walter Collins
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the Florida machete murder and what became of the missing boy named Walter Collins.

programme.title: Arctic Apocalypse
programme.desc: A massive influx of glacial melting triggers a new ice age in the Northern Hemisphere, forcing a family to make their away the across ice-covered landscape before they are frozen out for good.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Three Rivers to Cross
programme.desc: Ifølge lokale munker er Famed Jade Empress gjemt i dalen som vil bli oversvømmet når Three Rivers Dam flomportene har sin store åpning.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Lost Contact
programme.desc: Sydney, Nigel og milliardærentreprenør Rod Thorson fallskjerm i Myanmar-jungelen for å redde et relikktjaktteam ansatt av Thorson for å finne en eldgammel offerskål.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Cross of Voodoo
programme.desc: Når to studenter på sporet av det haitiske korset i Utu forsvinner i New Orleans, går Sydney og Nigel ned på bukten for å finne dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Sydney og Nigel er på tur, så Claudia bestemmer seg for å hjelpe Sydneys venn Roger med å finne Julius Cæsars rustning, men relikktjakt er ikke hennes talent.

programme.title: CBS News 24/7
programme.desc: Coverage, reporting and storytelling from CBS News and Stations; a look at how news coverage comes together.

programme.title: The Takeout with Major Garrett
programme.desc: The Takeout is a new spin on the widely acclaimed podcast hosted by Major Garrett; a daily streaming show that harnesses the best of CBS News' political reporting and lives comfortably in deep discussions.

programme.title: The Daily Report
programme.desc: The Daily Report on CBS News features original interviews and insights on the most important, urgent and interesting stories of the day.

programme.title: 24/7 Primetime
programme.desc: 24/7 Primetime is your essential daily guide to all the stories shaping your world. Anchored by CBS News' Elizabeth Cook, the show delivers the news you need to know.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder at Loose Chippings
programme.desc: After a wealthy couple is found dead in their stately Virginia home, investigators are taken on a wild journey around the globe before they uncover the shocking truth.

programme.title: On the Case: Innocent Witness
programme.desc: When Rhonda Boggs is discovered murdered in her own kitchen, police get an important lead from the only witness to the crime, Rhonda's two year old daughter.

programme.title: On the Case: Footprints and Whispers
programme.desc: A beloved husband and wife are found dead in their own home. Will the killers own words bring him to justice?

programme.title: On the Case: Pattern of Violence
programme.desc: A 22 year old real estate agent is discovered strangled to death inside a model home she was trying to sell.

programme.title: On the Case: Field of Nightmares
programme.desc: A young mother and son are found shot to death in a quiet Texas field. Would a mysterious bag left at the crime scene hold the key to catching their killer?

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT
programme.desc: Duane lands a huge contract for the Electra and puts enormous pressure on mechanic Adam to prep the plane without the help of his mentor Chuck.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Top of the World
programme.desc: The Electra flies to Alert, the northernmost settlement on Earth, forcing Adam and new senior manager Duane to work things out.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Last Days
programme.desc: Sparks fly when Joe discovers Gord has taken a job with a rival airline after completing expensive training on one of the Buffalo planes

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Bobby Farrelly, Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci, Joshua Felder
programme.desc: "Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Chris Freimuth, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Theresa Caputo
programme.desc: "Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mario Cantone, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Daisy Jones and the Six Cast, Drew's News
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Christine Taylor, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mikel Welch, Eitan Bernath, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "The Talk" Hosts, Drew's News
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell, Sheryl Underwood, Akbar Gbaja-Biamila and Amanda Kloots are joining Drew and taking on the final five to answer rapid fire questions about themselves!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with "The Talk" Hosts
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Sheryl Underwood, Drew's News

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dead Ringer

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Wanted Howard Pilmar Dead?

programme.title: 48 Hours: Power, Passion and Poison

programme.title: 48 Hours: Blood and Money on Horseshoe Bay
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Unraveling the Lies of Jodi Arias
programme.desc: 4 years after the death of Travis Alexander, Arias was found guilty of first-degree murder. At first, she told police she knew nothing of the killing, then at trial, she admitted her involvement in his murder, but claimed it was in self-defense.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Twisted Case of Angie Dodge
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Cops: Memory Loss
programme.desc: A man on parole dumps a stolen car and flees from officers on foot. A man denies stealing a wallet from a car with a smashed window. A hostile woman gives officers a false name.

programme.title: Cops: Up for Sainthood
programme.desc: Officers pursue two juveniles involved in a carjacking. Two men sitting in a truck are spotted hiding something in the console. A man claims he took drug paraphernalia from kids as a good samaritan.

programme.title: Cops: Beer Run
programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops: Petrol Heist
programme.desc: Officers wrestle an uncooperative driver to the ground after a traffic stop. Deputies search for a man who sent threatening texts to his ex-girlfriend. Two suspects are caught stealing gas.

programme.title: Cops: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops: Decorating Tips
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called when an agitated man armed with scissors tears up a trailer. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops: Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: Deputies observe a woman stuff drugs into her bra. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Murder in Le Grand Bornand (Flactif case)
programme.desc: Xavier Flactif, his partner Graziella and their three children suddenly disappear. For several days, mystery reigns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Killer Cop (Tavernier Case)
programme.desc: Firefighters in Barbizieux, Charente, are called to a fire in a large house in the village. They arrive to find the lifeless body of the owner, Claude Tavernier, 83, lying in a large pool of blood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Fatal Student Night (Stéphane Kameugne Case)
programme.desc: On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: A Deadly Date On the Internet (Ciampi case)
programme.desc: Marina Ciampi, 52, is found dead at her home in Marseille. The victim is naked on her bed, a plastic bag over her head. But no trace of a break-in is detected.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 601
programme.desc: Den 14. november 2019 forsvinner sytten år gamle Wilma, og hele Uddevalla blir involvert i forsvinningen. Etter noen dager blir det funnet blod i hennes og kjærestens leilighet, men Wilma er fortsatt savnet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Brad Leone Celebrates Thanksgiving With Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Brad Leone is the Bon Appétit Test Kitchen manager-turned-host of the "It's Alive" series.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: John Oliver discusses the problems with cable news and his iconic (in his own mind) free kick in Soweto.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.desc: Cardi discusses the art of a rap intro song, her admiration for Rihanna and her undying love for FDR.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Ed Helms is an actor and comedian whose credits include "The Office" and the "The Hangover" trilogy.

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones: Ronda Rousey Splits Bones While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Allies devise scientific and mechanical breakthroughs to thwart Hitler's Atlantic Wall and to make the D-Day invasion successful.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci remains intriguing 500 years after death; beyond great artist, he was remarkable scientist and inventor whose notebooks contained incredible machines from weapons to submarines, robots, and analogue computers with workable plans.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: They block the force of a river, produce enough electricity to power cities, move water over hundreds of miles and irrigate fertile valleys.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Weapons That Changed The World examines the RPG-7, renowned for its ability to take on tanks and level buildings. Host Wil Willis traces its evolution from WWII's Bazooka to modern counterparts like the AT-4 and Carl Gustav.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: Japan attacks the USA on 7 Dec 1941. For the next 6 months, they continue to have successful attacks.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: The Sulmona Trail
programme.desc: Monty follows the route taken by prisoner of war Len Harley, who spent months on the run before braving snow, ice, and Nazi patrols to escape over the mountains of the Majella in Italy.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: Allies turn the tide in the Atlantic, where initially German U-Boats harass freely convoys to supply Britain. The route to bring American soldiers who will land on D-Day is clear.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Inside Man
programme.desc: Chaim Rumkowski, leader of the Lodz ghetto during WWII, believed cooperation with the Nazis could save lives, providing labor in exchange for food. This approach kept some semblance of community and culture alive amidst unimaginable horror.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Tvillinger
programme.desc: Freddie prøver å bevise at Melanie, Sams tvillingesøster, er Sam i forkledning. Når Carly underviser Spencers nemesis, Chuck, prøver Spencer å overbevise henne om at Chuck er ond.

programme.title: iCarly: A date en pøbel del 2
programme.desc: Når Carly oppdager at hennes tøffe kjæreste Griffin samler på små Pee Wee Babies, må hun ta stilling til om hun holder ut å date en kar som har en kosedyrsamling. I mens forsøker Spencer å hjelpe Sam med å bli kvitt et mareritt.

programme.title: iCarly: iKamp mot Dingo
programme.desc: Dingo-kanalen har stjålet idéer fra iCarly, så Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer drar til Dingos Studio for å fortelle manusforfatterne hva de mener om det.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg tror de kysset
programme.desc: Da Sam kommer til å avsløre overfor Carly at hun og Freddie smugkysset, konfronterer Carly dem med hvorfor de ikke fortalte henne om det. Og Spencer underviser fanger i billedkunst i fengselet.

programme.title: iCarly: Kokkekamp
programme.desc: Når Carl, Sam og Freddie vinner over en berømt tv-kokk i en matlagningskonkurranse, vil ikke kokken lage mat mer og nekter å komme ut av soverommet sitt. Spencer prøver å oppfylle en fremtidsdrøm.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.
